title: Tridents Reimagined (long)
description: Changes the texture and model of tridents!
body:
Short version link: [Tridents Reimagined (short)](https://modrinth.com/project/Aj37d7Iv)

![Requires Optifine or EMF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30d49d84509284725ffb5265e7010ec1f17040a7_0.webp)

![Trident Size Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96d5d89ed023ee661510917047d56810afb923b9.png)

### 🔱 About:
Updates the model and texture of the trident to look more detailed. In vanilla it looks boring for that rare of an item

| Difference          | Deafult               | Vanilla              |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Has custom texture  | ✅                   | ❌                   |
| Has custom model    | ✅                   | ❌                   |
| Requires            | [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)                   |❌             |


### 📄 Credits:
Model created in Blockbench

Heavily inspired by [CatFromNet's](https://modrinth.com/user/CatFromNet) [Rethoughted Trident](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rethoughted-trident/gallery) resource pack

Textures and model created by im_kurt
